title: Sealapack Multipurpose Carrier Bags, Pack of 40
features: BAG FOR EVERY OCCASION: Sealapack Multipurpose Carrier bags are perfect to have in the car to place shopping into, carry lunch or carry an umbrella or extra layer when out for a walk or a sit in the park.
SMALL & COMPACT: Remove a bag, fold and keep in a coat or jacket pocket, bag or rucksack to always have an emergency carrier bag to hand
VALUE BAGS: Perfect for cafes, grocers, take aways and newsagents to have an inexpensive bag to quickly pack shopping into
DUAL USE: Bring home your shopping and then reuse the empty bags as bin liners or to place cat litter into
ABOUT THE PRODUCT: ROLL OF 40 BAGS
description: Product Description Sealapack Multipurpose Carrier bags are perfect to have in the car to place shopping into, carry lunch or carry an umbrella or extra layer when out for a walk or a sit in the park. Remove a bag, fold and keep in a coat or jacket pocket, bag or rucksack to always have an emergency carrier bag to hand. Perfect for cafes, grocers, take aways and newsagents to have an inexpensive bag to quickly pack shopping into. Roll of 40 white bags Manufacturer Contact Information 151 Products Limited, Manchester M4 6AF
